description: Randomize the execution order of a set of design runs (e.g. a DOE matrix), so factors are not confounded with time/drift (machine warm-up, reagent aging).
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the exact run order is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
spec provides exactly one of rows (inline) or design_csv (path)
needs numpy + pandas; no network or GPU
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: rows (list[dict] of design rows) OR design_csv (path to a CSV), and seed (int). Output: run_order.csv (input rows plus a randomized 'run_order' column, sorted) under record_store.
limitation: Only randomizes order; does not generate the design itself (use the *-factorial / response-surface perks for that).
